subject: [AAI] Make use of filebeatEnabled flag

Although I'm in favor of removing filebeat when possible, I'd prefer to use our templates:
https://github.com/onap/oom/blob/master/kubernetes/common/common/templates/_log.tpl

here's an usage of such template: https://github.com/onap/oom/blob/master/kubernetes/policy/components/policy-clamp-be/
